name: zsys_measure_cpu_mhz_cmos_rtc
description: CpuBenchmarkResolver::MeasureCpuMhz_CmosRtc measures CPU rate across CMOS seconds changes using split high/low counter helpers.
known_limits: The smoke covers the public CPU MHz path and the leaf helpers used by this path.
The original waits on CMOS RTC seconds and reads TSC directly; production source uses safe Win32 timing substitutes until a raw-assembly exception is approved.
